description_long: This chair features a tall, flat wooden backrest and a matching wooden seat, both constructed from dark-stained planks with a visible wood grain texture. The armrests are simple, rectangular wooden beams that extend from the backrest to the front of the seat, providing support on both sides. The chair is supported by four cylindrical metal legs, which contrast with the wooden upper structure and give it a sturdy, industrial appearance. The seat and backrest are both flat and angular, with no visible cushioning, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for heavy use in public or urban environments such as parks or outdoor seating areas. The combination of wood and metal materials suggests durability and resistance to weathering.
description: A tall, angular wooden chair with a flat backrest, armrests, and four sturdy metal legs, featuring a minimalist and industrial design. The dark wood and metal combination gives it a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, flat wooden backrest and two metal legs extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular profile, flat seat, and the connection between the wooden armrest and metal legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide seat, both armrests, and the full height of the backrest with all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the angular structure and the relationship between the seat, armrest, and legs.
